extension.summary: Import widget backups and preloaded skin settings.
extension.description: Downloads or opens a widget backup ZIP, imports Skin Shortcuts XML or Arctic Fuse 3 Skin Variables widget JSON into the active skin profile, offers preloaded DutchTech widget and MacBook AH2/AF3 skin settings sources, optionally retargets Fen-style widget paths to another video add-on, and creates a restore backup before overwriting anything.
